image.desc:
This is a composite confocal image of primary hippocampal neurons. High affinity bungarotoxin receptors were stained with fluorescent bungarotoxin (c=1). The nicotinic acetylcholine alpha7 subunit is immunofluorescently labeled (c=2). A nAChR chaperone protein fused with CFP was transiently transfected into the neurons (c=3). Nuclei were dyed with Hoechst (c=4). A Nomarski optics image shows the morphology of the neuron (c=5). Image is courtesy of John Alexander. -------------------------------------------- (Fiji Is Just) ImageJ 2.14.0/1.54f; Java 1.8.0_322 [64-bit]; Windows 10 10.0; 145MB of 24256MB (<1%)
